title: Workshop: Debug a Resident Support Journal
summary: Workshop: Debug a Resident Support Journal retrieves prior skills in an original broken community-support case journal scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply accessibility disability models, accessibility tree, keyboard focus, accessible names descriptions in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real broken community-support case journal artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
